title: LoadRunIndex
description: One load run's complete result, as persisted to `load-result.json`.

canaries.description: The run's health canaries — the cross-call signals a triager scans first.

checks.description:
Per-scenario Test-case check-verdict tally over the SAMPLED calls (the
per-sample oracle): how many sampled calls passed all their checks vs
failed at least one. Empty when no case with checks was attached.

counts.description:
Per-`(scenario, class, chaos)` completed-call counts (the report's main
table). `class == "ok"` is the success bucket; `chaos == "near"` is
accepted kill collateral, `chaos == "clear"` is a genuine result.

meta.description: Run metadata: when it ran and the echoed knobs it ran with.

samples.description:
Links to the stored sampled callflow pages, grouped by their
`(scenario, class, chaos)` bucket. Paths are RELATIVE to the run dir.

Canaries.description: The run's cross-call health canaries — the first things a triager scans.

drops.description: Datagrams discarded by the simulated packet-loss model (0 when loss off).

orphans.description:
Inbound datagrams that matched no live call (a post-failover stray-send
burst is the classic SUT reclaim bug; should be ~0 in a clean run).

ringingExpected.description: Calls that reached the ring→answer step (the 18x-delivery denominator).

ringingReceived.description:
Of those, how many saw the 18x ringing provisional (numerator). A dropped
non-PRACK 18x is expected, so this is a RATE gated at >99%, not a per-call
failure.

shed.description: Offered calls dropped at the max-in-flight cap (offered load we shed).

CheckSummaryRow.description: Per-scenario Test-case check-verdict tally over the sampled calls.

failed.description: Sampled calls with at least one failing check (the `check_fail` class).

passed.description: Sampled calls whose every attached check passed.

CountRow.description: One `(scenario, class, case, chaos)` completed-call count.

case.description:
The bounded case discriminator refining the class into its distinct
failure modes (RFC rule id(s), failed check id(s), `agent@phase`).
Empty = un-refined (`ok` rows, indexes written before the field existed).

LatencyRow.description: Per-scenario end-to-end latency summary (all values in milliseconds).

LoadRunMeta.description: Run metadata: timing and the echoed run knobs.

cps.description: Offered call rate the run was configured for (calls/s).

egress.description:
The egress policy label the run realized its b-leg with
(`transparent` / `api-call-pin` / `registrar-aor`).

finished.description:
`false` while a periodic snapshot is written mid-run; `true` in the doc
written at run end.

finishedMs.description: Wall-clock finish (the moment this doc was written), Unix epoch ms.

maxInFlight.description: Max concurrent in-flight calls (offered load above this was shed).

profile.description: Optional load-profile description echoed from the run's `--load-profile`.

target.description: The SUT ingress the INVITEs were routed through (the `lb`/VIP address).

SampleGroup.description:
The stored sampled callflow pages for one `(scenario, class, case, chaos)`
bucket.
